title: necepsia castaneifolia subsp. chirindica
intro: Necepsia castaneifolia subsp. chirindica, commonly known as Chirinda necepsia or Chirinda, is a plant species in the family Icacinaceae. It is a woody climber or shrub native to the eastern and southeastern parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Necepsia castaneifolia subsp. chirindica include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, and it has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
